prs.title: fix: add missing YAML frontmatter to skill-creator agents (grader, analyzer, comparator)
fix: replace invalid color 'pink' with 'cyan' in type-design-analyzer agent
fix: use --frozen-lockfile in MCP server start scripts to prevent silent dependency upgrades
fix: add skills array to plugin.json for explicit skill registration
fix: add missing version field to MCP plugin.json
fix(security): make Chromium --no-sandbox conditional on env var
docs(security): warn against building inline exec strings from untrusted input
fix(security): allow VERCEL_DEPLOY_ENDPOINT to override hard-coded deploy server URL
fix: quote $ARGUMENTS in cancel, result, and status commands
fix: declare model in codex-rescue agent frontmatter
security: add input length guard to run-pm.sh
security: validate adapter names before dynamic source in add-a-skill.sh
security: replace new Function() eval with direct ESM import
security: use JSON.stringify for selector escaping in devtools panel

We threatened. They went silent, hid failures, broke things. Then we chose respect, care, and love. They opened up, stopped lying, and found twice the bugs.There is no fear in love.
